package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for same_domain_error_mapped_to_multiple_statuses: The same error type being converted to different HTTP status codes in the same module.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule157NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule157NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule157NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario157Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule157NegativeService, input Rule157NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
